content: I was in Room 7B from 14:45 to 15:20. I wore a blue jacket that day — yes, it was the same one Ram Singh described. But I never left the classroom. My attendance register and CCTV from the corridor confirm this. I didn’t see Arjun being taken. I didn’t know anything about it. I only found out later when the school was locked down. I was confused when the police asked me about the blue jacket — I didn’t realize anyone could have mistaken me for the kidnapper. I never touched Arjun or his bag.
